sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 스타벅스 2026 회계연도 1분기 매출 99억 달러 기록, 글로벌 동일 매장 매출 4% 성장

keyPoints.text: 글로벌 및 미국 동일 매장 매출이 각각 4% 증가하며 성장세를 보였으며, 특히 미국은 8분기 만에 처음으로 거래량 증가를 달성함
연결 기준 매출은 99억 달러로 전년 대비 6% 증가했으나, GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.26달러로 전년 대비 62% 감소함

businessChanges.text: 중국 사업 부문을 매각 예정 자산으로 분류하는 등 전략적 변화를 단행했으며, 1분기 중 128개의 순 신규 매장을 오픈하여 총 41,118개의 매장을 운영 중
Back to Starbucks 전략이 성과를 거두며 매출 모멘텀을 견인하고 있다고 경영진은 평가함

financialHighlights.text: 연결 매출은 99억 달러로 전년 대비 6% 증가함
중국 사업 매각 분류 및 세무 관련 영향으로 유효세율이 61.7%로 상승함

watchItems.text: 중국 사업 매각 진행 상황이 향후 재무제표 및 유효세율에 미칠 추가적인 영향
Back to Starbucks 전략의 지속적인 매출 성장 견인 여부 및 수익성 개선 속도

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 sbux-12282025xearningsrele.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Starbucks Reports Q1 Fiscal Year 2026 Results Q1 Comparable Store Sales Accelerate to 4% Globally and in the U.S., Led by Transactions Company Delivers U.S. Comparable Transaction Growth for the First Time in Eight Quarters Q1 Consolidated Net Revenues Up 6% to $9.9 Billion Q1 GAAP EPS $0.26, Non-GAAP EPS $0.56 Company Introduces Fiscal Year 2026 Guidance SEATTLE; January 28, 2026 – Starbucks Corporation (Nasdaq: SBUX) today reported financial results for its 13-week fiscal first quarter ended December 28, 2025. GAAP results in fiscal 2026 include items that are excluded from non-GAAP results. Please refer to the reconciliation of GAAP measures to non-GAAP measures at the end of this release for more information. Q1 Fiscal Year 2026 Highlights • Global comparable store sales increased 4%, driven by a 3% increase in co  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.9 Billion = 99억 달러; $9.9 = 9.9달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $0.56 = 0.56달러.

mparable transactions and a 1% increase in average ticket ◦ North America and U.S. comparable store sales increased 4%, driven by a 3% increase in comparable transactions and a 1% increase in average ticket ◦ International comparable store sales increased 5%, driven by a 3% increase in comparable transactions and a 2% increase in average ticket; China comparable store sales increased 7%, driven by a 5% increase in comparable transactions and a 2% increase in average ticket • The company opened 128 net new stores in Q1, ending the period with 41,118 stores: 52% company-operated and 48% licensed ◦ At the end of Q1, stores in the U.S. and China comprised 61% of the company’s global portfolio, with 16,911 and 8,011 stores in the U.S. and China, respectively • Consolidated net revenues increased 6% to $9.9 billion, or a 5% increas  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.9 billion = 99억 달러; $9.9 = 9.9달러; 41,118 million = 411억 1,800만 달러; 16,911 million = 169억 1,100만 달러; 8,011 million = 80억 1,100만 달러.

ed 290 basis points year-over-year to 9.0%, primarily driven by labor investments in support of “Back to Starbucks” and inflationary pressures, largely driven by elevated coffee pricing and tariffs. ◦ Non-GAAP operating margin contracted 180 basis points year-over-year to 10.1%, including on a constant currency basis • Effective tax rate of 61.7% compared to 23.6% in the prior year, with the increase primarily driven by the discrete impact of changes in indefinite reinvestment assertions as a result of classifying our Starbucks retail operations in China as held for sale in the first quarter of 2026 and lapping the discrete impact of a tax status change for a certain foreign entity. ◦ Non-GAAP effective tax rate increased 320 basis points to 26.8% • GAAP earnings per share of $0.26 declined 62% over prior year ◦ Non-GAAP earnings per share of $0.  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.26 = 0.26달러; $0.56 = 0.56달러; 290 basis points = 290포인트; 180 basis points = 180포인트; 320 basis points = 320포인트.

on a constant currency basis “Our Q1 results demonstrate our 'Back to Starbucks' strategy is working and we believe we're ahead of schedule,” commented Brian Niccol, chairman and chief executive officer. “It's great to see the sales momentum driven by more customers choosing Starbucks more often, and this is just the beginning.” “With our 'Back to Starbucks' initiatives gaining traction, we have clear line of sight to translating topline strength into sustainable earnings growth that positions us for long-term profitable growth,” commented Cathy Smith, chief financial officer. 2 Q1 North America Segment Results Quarter Ended Change (%) ($ in millions) Dec 28, 2025 Dec 29, 2024 Change in Comparable Store Sales (1) 4% (4  Normalized numeric aliases: $7,280.5 = 7,280.5달러; $7,071.9 = 7,071.9달러; $867.0 = 867.0달러; $1,181.3 = 1,181.3달러; 18,360 million = 183억 6,000만 달러; 18,537 million = 185억 3,700만 달러; 7,280 million = 72억 8,000만 달러; 7,071 million = 70억 7,100만 달러; 1,181 million = 11억 8,100만 달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
